credits.low: Low credits. Contact the admin for more.

layout.completenessGateBody: Your kit is at {{percentage}}% and you need at least {{minimum}}% to use this module.

layout.completenessGateUnlocked: Without that minimum, Image and the rest of the modules stay locked.

copyCard.placeholder: Your generated copy will appear here...

preview.title: Preview

preview.configureInPanel: Configure the carousel details in the side panel.
preview.visualContentHint: The narrative intent and advanced visual rules are kept internally, so you do not need to edit them here.

preview.exportingVideoDescription: We are assembling the carousel MP4. This can take a moment.
preview.mp4ExportedDescription: Ready to publish on Facebook or TikTok.
preview.webmExportedDescription: Your browser exported WebM. If you need MP4, we can try a different encoding strategy.
preview.videoExportErrorDescription: The video could not be generated.
preview.configureCarouselPanel: Set up the details in the right panel to generate slides
preview.noExperimentalTracks: No experimental tracks are available in /songs.

feedback.title: What did you think?

styleImage.selectPresetDescription: This style uses a saved analysis and is injected directly into the prompt.
